rationale: Large CI/CD overhaul (consolidated PR of 3 segments). Adds composite action .github/actions/setup-validadores/action.yml (Python 3.12 + pip cache + pyyaml install), centralized .github/scripts/module-map.sh shell library (defines MODULOS_CANONICOS, module_singular, module_validator, module_ejemplo, module_plantilla, module_is_special) to deduplicate workflow logic across the 10 canonical modules. New .github/workflows/release.yml triggers on `v*` tags, uses `env:` block to safely interpolate tag names (avoiding injection), runs awk to extract release notes from CHANGELOG.md between `## [VERSION]` headers, then calls softprops/action-gh-release@v2 with body_path. New .github/workflows/link-check.yml runs lychee weekly (cron '0 8 * * 1') and creates/updates a GitHub issue with label 'links-rotos' when broken links are found. ci-global.yml gains `cache: pip` on setup-python steps, excludes .pre-commit-config.yaml from yamllint, refactors shellcheck to track aggregate EXIT, and refactors the resumen-final job to use env: vars instead of inline ${{...}} interpolation. security-scan.yml drops unnecessary `fetch-depth: 0` and pins trufflesecurity/trufflehog from @main to @v3.88.29. Adds requirements.txt with pyyaml, ruff.toml with per-file-ignore for validadores/base.py, and 5 stub README.md files in scaffolding directories. Closed without merge but the diff content cleanly delivers the stated overhaul.
